title: Katravai Patravai Lyrics Kaala
stanzas:
otha thala raavanaa
paththuthala aavuda
othaiyila nikkura vengaida
dhillirundha moththama vaangada

eluchigalai puratchiyaaka va
varappugalai vayalgal aaka va
varumai enum noyai theerka va
adimaithanam neeyum poka va.

va
puzhuthu pona manasula inga
pudichipona azhukunga thanga
veluthu vaangum manusanga enga
onu serndhu nerikkanum sanga

va..
unnidam illathellaam
thaedi therindhidu
..
ullathil ottrumaiyai
koodi thirindhidu

go!!! vaa
unnaiyum mannaiyum
vendru vaa - theeradha
or thaevaiyai
kondu vaa - nooraayiram
aandugal podhume - onragave
maaruvaai seeruvaai

otha thala raavanaa
othaiyila nikkura vengaida

yei ..
trying to bring me down
for nothing.
let me tell you something
that I ain't going down
without a fight
being afraid of the
dark black night.

ethiri yaarum norungi poga
adithu norukku nodiyil
kadhari padhari sedhari oda
sila narigala oda vidu ini

va...
unnaiyum mannaiyum
vendru vaa - theeradha
or thaevaiyai
kondu vaa - nooraayiram
aandugal podhume - onragave
maaruvaai seeruvaai..
tamilStanzas:
ஒத்த தல ராவணா
பத்து தல ஆவுடா 
ஒத்தையில நிக்குற வேங்கைடா 
தில்லிருந்தா மொத்தமா வாங்கடா

எழுச்சிகளை புரட்சியாக்க வா
வரப்புகளை வயல்கள் ஆக்க வா
வறுமை என்னும் நோயை தீர்க்க வா
அடிமைத்தனம் நீயும் போக்க வா

வா
புழுத்து போன மனசுல இங்க
புடிச்சிப்போன அழுக்குங்க தங்க
வெளுத்து வாங்கும் மனுசங்க எங்க
ஒன்னு சேர்ந்து நெரிக்கணும் சங்க

வா .. 
உன்னிடம் உள்ளதெல்லாம்  தேடி தெரிந்திடு .
. 
உள்ளத்தில் ஒற்றுமையை கூடி திரிந்திடு

உண்மை வெளியிடு 
இல்லை பலியிடு.

go!!!
வா !!!
உன்னையும் மண்ணையும் 
வென்று வா -தீராத
ஓர் தேவையை 
கொண்டுவா -நூறாயிரம்
ஆண்டுகள் போதுமே
 ஒன்றாகவே  மாறுவாய்  சீறுவாய்

காலா ...

ஒத்த  தல ராவணா
ஒத்தையில நிக்குற வேங்கைட

yei ..
trying to bring me down
for nothing.
let me tell you something
that I ain't going down
without a fight
being afraid of the
dark black night.

எதிரி யாரும் நொறுங்கி போக
அடித்து நொறுக்கி
நொடியில் கதறி பதறி செதறி ஓடி
 சில நரிகளை ஓட விடு இனி

வா !!!
உன்னையும் மண்ணையும்

ஓர் தேவையை

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Katravai Patravai?

The song is a motivational anthem encouraging empowerment and action.

Who composed the music for Kaala?

Santhosh Narayanan composed the music for the movie.

What role does the song play in the movie Kaala?

The song serves as a rallying cry for the protagonist's fight against oppression.

Who wrote and performed Katravai Patravai?

Arunraja Kamaraj both wrote and performed the song.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Katravai Patravai is a stirring motivational song from the movie Kaala, performed and penned by Arunraja Kamaraj. The song is set against the backdrop of the protagonist's struggle for justice and empowerment. With its energetic beats and powerful lyrics, it inspires listeners to rise against adversity. Santhosh Narayanan's music amplifies the revolutionary spirit, making it a perfect anthem for those seeking motivation and strength.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Katravai Patravai from the movie Kaala is a powerful anthem that channels the raw energy and motivational spirit of Arunraja Kamaraj's vocals. With Santhosh Narayanan's intense musical backdrop, this song is a call to action and empowerment. Dive into the revolutionary vibe that makes this track a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: The ten-headed Ravana stands tall, come and take everything from Delhi.
Turn your struggles into a revolution, turn boundaries into fields, cure the disease of poverty, and let slavery end.
Come, in the dusty hearts, let the hidden dirt be washed away, let the people unite and stand strong.
Come, search for what you don't have, find it, and let unity grow in your heart.
Reveal the truth or sacrifice it.
Go! Come, conquer yourself and the land, bring an endless need, a thousand years are enough, change and unite.
Trying to bring me down for nothing. Let me tell you something that I ain't going down without a fight being afraid of the dark black night.
Let no enemy break you, crush them in a moment, let some foxes run away now.
Come, conquer yourself and the land, bring an endless need, a thousand years are enough, change and unite.
Hold on to what you learn.
